title: Lamon's Additions
description: A couple of additions that try to feel as vanilla as possible, adding new items that felt like they were missing from the actual game.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a5fdc77863e15125758c572b18f205b07521381.png)

**V1.1.0**

This is a short mod that adds a couple of features that aim to feel as vanilla as possible for your worlds!

Every Recipe for the New Items is possible to craft through vanilla items. These new items include:

- **Bread with Honey**
- **Fruit Salad**
- **Honey Fruit Salad**
- **Honey Filled Baked Potato**
- **Honey Glazed Melon**
- **And WAY More!**

and more will be added over time!

This mod is for NeoForge ONLY, and for 1.20.6, and will get updated to 1.21 at some point.

### Have fun!

**[Curseforge Version of this Mod!](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lamons-additions)**
